scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev:api: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && cd artifacts/api-server && node ./build.mjs && PORT=${API_PORT:-8080} node --enable-source-maps ./dist/index.mjs
scripts.dev:web: export $(grep -v '^#' .env | xargs) && cd artifacts/autonegotiating && PORT=${FRONTEND_PORT:-3000} API_PORT=${API_PORT:-8080} npx vite --config vite.config.ts --host 0.0.0.0
